summary: The implementation adds an admin export page that displays project structure and provides information about accessing the deployed code, but does not implement the core requirement of generating and downloading an actual archive file. The feature is informational only, not a functional code export system.

missing_requirements.requirement: Generate a complete downloadable archive containing all project source code in a standard compressed format (zip or tar.gz)
missing_requirements.reason: The AdminExportPage only displays text-based project structure information and instructions for accessing deployed code. No archive generation or download functionality is implemented - no zip/tar.gz creation, no file bundling logic, and no actual download mechanism

missing_requirements.requirement: Archive includes all frontend source files from the frontend directory
missing_requirements.reason: No archive is created. The page only displays a text representation of the directory structure, not actual file bundling

missing_requirements.requirement: Archive includes all backend source files (main.mo and any other .mo files)
missing_requirements.reason: No archive is created. Backend files are not collected or bundled for download

missing_requirements.requirement: Archive includes configuration files (package.json, tailwind.config.js, etc.)
missing_requirements.reason: No archive is created. Configuration files are not collected or bundled

missing_requirements.requirement: User can download the archive through the interface or receive a download link
missing_requirements.reason: No download functionality exists. The page only provides a copy-to-clipboard button for the text structure and displays informational content about accessing the deployed application

hallucinated_features.description: Admin-only access control with authentication checks and permission verification for the export page
hallucinated_features.reason: The BuildRequest explicitly states as a non-goal: 'Do not modify any existing functionality'. The requirement does not mention admin-only access or authentication requirements for the export feature

hallucinated_features.description: Informational content about deployed application access via Juno deployment URLs and canister IDs
hallucinated_features.reason: The requirement is to export project code as a downloadable archive, not to provide information about accessing deployed instances. This deployment information feature was not requested
